title: Becket House - SMS
notes:
Cooling Tower Cleaning Schedule - OOH

May - Pack out - 2 men - 2 days
Please take borescope pictures inside packing of all packing


Nov - CT Pack in, 2 men - 1 days
Please take borescope pictures inside packing of all packing

System Volume = 18,000L (1x system) 2 x Condensers
Chlorine Granules (to get to 60ppm) = 3kg
Liquid Chlorine (to get to 60ppm) CHLOR15/Hy-Bio-Chlor = 6L
Liquid Biodispersants WTP SPERSE 300/T4W: Hy-Sperse = 900ml
Antifoam Hy-Antifoam = 900ml
Neutraliser Granuals @50ppm Chlorine 900g or Neutraliser Liquid WTP DECHLOR 20 = 14L

notes:
March – Q – 4pts- CS – 1 X Chem Basic and 1 X BSRIA Bacti from the LTHW, CHW, and ESSENTIAL CHW Systems Main Circulation. 2 x Remote samples - 4 BSRIA BACTI and 4 Chem (REMOTE BASIC)

June – H – 6pts - TI, DS – 6 x Micro from CWS outlets/CWST, 6 x LP from showers, 3 x calorifiers and 1 x random HWS. CS – 1 X Chem Basic and 1 X BSRIA Bacti from the LTHW, CHW and ESSENTIAL CHW Systems Main Circulation. 2 x Remote samples - 4 BSRIA BACTI and 4 Chem (REMOTE BASIC)

Sep – Q – 4pts- CS –1 X Chem Basic and 1 X BSRIA Bacti from the LTHW, CHW and ESSENTIAL CHW Systems Main Circulation. 2 x Remote samples - 4 BSRIA BACTI and 4 Chem (REMOTE BASIC)

Dec – H – 6pts - TI, DS – 6 x Micro from CWS outlets/CWST, 6 x LP from showers, 3 x calorifiers and 1 x random HWS. CS – 1 X Chem Basic and 1 X BSRIA Bacti from the LTHW, CHW and ESSENTIAL CHW Systems Main Circulation. 2 x Remote samples - 4 BSRIA BACTI and 4 Chem (REMOTE BASIC)

02/03/26-- any closed system micro samples need to go to Latis ONLY

Also add a note to Jim's diary for a week after to forward lab originals to Luke for uploading to the clients consultant portal (interim report not needed)

title: Kings Place - JBS (SA)
notes:
CS sampling schedule only (Points for all visits are on here) - OOH

**Dont Sample from Risers moving forward, Please also ensure you speak to someone on site when attend**

NB Refractometer needed for CS Chem Samples

March - H - 12 pts - 3x Main Circulation samples LTHW, CHW and Condense pump (2x BASIC CHEM, 1x CHEM BASIC+GLYCOL [Condenser] and 3x BSRIA VALIDATION), 9 x FCU samples (LTHW and CHW from each 18x BSRIA VALIDATION) and 18xREMOTE BASIC CHEM), Also take water meter readings from LTHW, CHW and Condense, 
PLUS ONSITE GLYCOL TEST FROM CONDENSER SYSTEM

June - Q - 12pts - 3x Main Circulation samples LTHW, CHW and Condense pump (2x BASIC CHEM, 1x CHEM BASIC+GLYCOL [Condenser] and 3x BSRIA VALIDATION)), 9 x FCU samples (LTHW and CHW from each 18x BSRIA VALIDATION) and 18xREMOTE BASIC CHEM), Also take water meter readings from LTHW, CHW and Condense
PLUS ONSITE GLYCOL TEST FROM CONDENSER SYSTEM

Sept - H - 12pts - 3x Main Circulation samples LTHW, CHW and Condense pump (2x BASIC CHEM, 1x CHEM BASIC+GLYCOL [Condenser] and 3x BSRIA VALIDATION)) 9 x FCU samples (LTHW & CHW from each 18x BSRIA VALIDATION) and 18xREMOTE BASIC CHEM) Also take water meter readings from LTHW, CHW and Condense 
PLUS ONSITE GLYCOL TEST FROM CONDENSER SYSTEM


Dec - Q - 12pts - 3x Main Circulation samples LTHW, CHW and Condense pump (2x BASIC CHEM, 1x CHEM BASIC+GLYCOL [Condenser] and 3x BSRIA VALIDATION)), 9 x FCU samples (LTHW & CHW from each 18x BSRIA VALIDATION) and 18xREMOTE BASIC CHEM). Also take water meter readings from LTHW, CHW and Condense
PLUS ONSITE GLYCOL TEST FROM CONDENSER SYSTEM

notes:
CAT 5 Tank 2 - Tank Clean 

To drain, clean and disinfect cold water storage tank(s) only

Works will include post cleaning contact spray disinfection of the tank internals using BPR registered Silver Hydrogen Peroxide for 1 hour. Tank to be refilled with fresh water, checked for residual Hydrogen Peroxide, and returned to service.
